home.title: La Cour de Haut — Gîte & Holiday Home in Normandy
home.description: Stay at La Cour de Haut, a charming gîte in the Normandy countryside, France.

book.title: Book your stay
book.description: Reserve your perfect stay at La Cour de Haut.

header.bookDescription: Fill in the form to send a request for your stay.

hero.description: A captivating introduction to the website, featuring a visually striking image and a compelling headline that immediately grabs the visitor's attention.

form.name: First and last name
form.successMessage: Thank you for your booking! We will contact you shortly.
form.errorMessage: An error occurred while processing your booking. Please try again later or contact us by email or phone.
form.datesUnavailable: The selected dates are no longer available. Please choose different dates.
form.totalPrice: Total price: {pricePerNight} x {totalNights} nights = {totalPrice} including tourism tax: {tourismTax}
form.price_includes: The rental price includes end-of-stay cleaning, bed and bath linen, energy consumption and free WiFi.
form.disclaimer: After submitting the booking form, we will contact you to confirm availability and provide further details and payment instructions. Your booking will only be finalized after our confirmation and receipt of payment.

paymentSchedule.heading: Payment in instalments
paymentSchedule.deposit: Deposit ({percentage}%): {amount} — within {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}} of confirmation
paymentSchedule.balanceWithBorg: Balance incl. security deposit: {amount} — no later than {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}} before arrival ({date})
paymentSchedule.balance: Balance: {amount} — no later than {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}} before arrival ({date})
paymentSchedule.totalWithBorg: Full amount incl. security deposit: {amount} — due after confirmation, before arrival
paymentSchedule.total: Full amount: {amount} — due after confirmation, before arrival
paymentSchedule.borgNote: The {amount} security deposit is refunded after your stay.

fieldErrors.email: Please enter a valid email address
fieldErrors.phone: Please enter a valid phone number
fieldErrors.dateRange: The check-out date must be after the check-in date
fieldErrors.guestCount: Number of guests must be 1 or 2
fieldErrors.minNights: Select at least 2 dates for a minimum stay of 1 night

booking.consentNotice: By submitting this request you agree to our <terms>terms and conditions</terms>; please also read our <privacy>privacy policy</privacy>.

notFound.heading: Page not found
notFound.body: Sorry, the page you are looking for doesn’t exist or has moved.

serverError.heading: Something went wrong
serverError.body: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again — if the problem persists, contact us by email or phone.
